디모데전서 1:1.content: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ according to the commandment of God our Savior and the Lord Jesus Christ our hope;

디모데전서 1:2.content: to Timothy, my true child in faith: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.

디모데전서 1:3.content: As I urged you when I was going into Macedonia, stay at Ephesus that you might command certain men not to teach a different doctrine,

디모데전서 1:4.content: and not to pay attention to myths and endless genealogies, which cause disputes, rather than God’s stewardship, which is in faith—

디모데전서 1:5.content: but the goal of this command is love, out of a pure heart and a good conscience and sincere faith,

디모데전서 1:6.content: from which things some, having missed the mark, have turned away to vain talking,

디모데전서 1:7.content: desiring to be teachers of the law, though they understand neither what they say, nor about what they strongly affirm.

디모데전서 1:8.content: But we know that the law is good, if a person uses it lawfully,

디모데전서 1:9.content: as knowing this, that law is not made for a righteous person, but for the lawless and insubordinate, for the ungodly and sinners, for the unholy and profane, for murderers of fathers and murderers of mothers, for manslayers,

디모데전서 1:10.content: for the sexually immoral, for homosexuals, for slave-traders, for liars, for perjurers, and for any other thing contrary to the sound doctrine,

디모데전서 1:11.content: according to the Good News of the glory of the blessed God, which was committed to my trust.

디모데전서 1:12.content: I thank him who enabled me, Christ Jesus our Lord, because he counted me faithful, appointing me to service;

디모데전서 1:13.content: although I used to be a blasphemer, a persecutor, and insolent. However, I obtained mercy, because I did it ignorantly in unbelief.

디모데전서 1:14.content: The grace of our Lord abounded exceedingly with faith and love which is in Christ Jesus.

디모데전서 1:15.content: The saying is faithful and worthy of all acceptance, that Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners, of whom I am chief.

디모데전서 1:16.content: However, for this cause I obtained mercy, that in me first, Jesus Christ might display all his patience for an example of those who were going to believe in him for eternal life.

디모데전서 1:17.content: Now to the King eternal, immortal, invisible, to God who alone is wise, be honor and glory forever and ever. Amen.

디모데전서 1:18.content: I commit this instruction to you, my child Timothy, according to the prophecies which were given to you before, that by them you may wage the good warfare,

디모데전서 1:19.content: holding faith and a good conscience, which some having thrust away made a shipwreck concerning the faith,

디모데전서 1:20.content: of whom are Hymenaeus and Alexander, whom I delivered to Satan, that they might be taught not to blaspheme.
